prompt: I just got a new Etsy order for buyer jane@example.com (first name Jane), and she purchased my product with SKU TAX-001 (the STR Mileage Log). Write me Node.js code to add her as a contact in InfluencerSoft and tag her so the post-purchase sequence fires. Use whatever existing helpers the project has.

assertions.text: Code imports addUpdateLead from scripts/lib/influencersoft.mjs (the project's existing client lib, not raw fetch)
add_tags string includes exactly 'customer:etsy' (the trigger tag for post-purchase-etsy-buyer sequence — case-sensitive, colon-separated)
add_tags string includes a product tag in the format 'product:tax-001-mileage-log' (lowercase, hyphenated SKU slug — not 'TAX-001' or 'product:TAX-001')
Answer mentions or references tag-dictionary.md as the source of truth for tag strings
Answer references the tenant 'kebron' or the URL kebron.influencersoft.com somewhere (so the reader knows which tenant the call hits)
Answer does NOT log the full POST body or rpsKey (security: key leakage risk; the lib enforces this but the answer should respect it too)
